title: Method-year rows
description: Schema for roles/<role_id>/method_years.csv. Method-year rows hold numeric inputs, outputs, costs, emissions, limits, evidence, assumptions, and validation notes for one method in one milestone year.

role_id.description: Role satisfied by this method-year row.

representation_id.description: Direct representation bundle that exposes this method.

year.description: Milestone year represented by this row.

output_cost_per_unit.description: Real cost per output unit. Use null or a blank CSV cell when no defensible value is available.

cost_basis_year.description: Base year used to normalize output_cost_per_unit into real terms.

currency.description: Currency or price-basis label for output_cost_per_unit.

cost_components_summary.description: Short note describing which cost components are included or excluded.

input_commodities.description: JSON-encoded array of input commodity identifiers.

input_coefficients.description: JSON-encoded array of per-unit input coefficients.

input_basis_notes.description: Notes on how the input coefficients were derived, normalized, or interpreted.

energy_emissions_by_pollutant.description: JSON-encoded array of pollutant and value objects for energy emissions.

process_emissions_by_pollutant.description: JSON-encoded array of pollutant and value objects for process emissions or removals.

emissions_units.description: Unit label applied to the emissions values.

emissions_boundary_notes.description: Boundary note explaining what emissions are included, excluded, or represented elsewhere.

max_share.description: Optional upper bound on the share of total role demand this method may satisfy in the given year.

max_activity.description: Optional absolute upper bound on activity or output in the given year.

min_share.description: Optional lower bound on the share of total role demand this method must satisfy in the given year.

rollout_limit_notes.description: Narrative explanation for any max_share, max_activity, or min_share limit.

availability_conditions.description: Text description of conditions that must hold for the method to be available or credible.

evidence_summary.description: Short summary of the evidence base supporting the row values.

derivation_method.description: Brief description of how the row was synthesized, scaled, interpolated, or calibrated from sources.

confidence_rating.description: Qualitative confidence class for the row.

review_notes.description: Reviewer caveats, unresolved questions, or quality flags.

candidate_expansion_pathway.description: Short note on how this reduced-form method could expand into a richer future model.

times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes.description: Notes on possible TIMES or VedaLang mapping, process-chain interpretation, or future model integration.

would_expand_to_explicit_capacity.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this method would likely expand into an explicit capacity-style representation.

would_expand_to_process_chain.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this method would likely expand into a more explicit process-chain representation.
